executive_summary: Fear & Greed Index has crashed from 34→25→22 over 3 consecutive days into Extreme Fear while SPY RSI approaches overbought at 69.3, demanding maximum defensive positioning with elevated cash. Key actions today: execute mandatory FTNT trim (RSI=87 Day 3 overbought), initiate TSM ADD as semiconductor rotation replacing AVGO’s primary slot, and maintain 38% cash. With 1-day accuracy at 0% and a declining 42→25→0 accuracy trend, this strategy tilts toward proven defensives (WMT, PEP, GILD) and gold hedge (NEM) while limiting new capital deployment to one high-conviction ADD.
